meta.name: description
meta.content: Home of RSS Parrot, a free Fediverse service that lets you turn Mastodon into an RSS or Atom feed reader.

meta.name: og:description
meta.content: Home of RSS Parrot, a free Fediverse service that lets you turn Mastodon into an RSS or Atom feed reader.

p.i: These are the feeds the Parrot is currently following. More recently requested are at the top.
